#  Allow Users To Delete Published Markups 
##  Background 
By default, users with 'Standard' level permissions do not have the ability to delete markups on the 'Published' layer in drawings (see [What is the difference between personal and published drawing markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)). However, you can override this default setting if you would like to give your 'Standard' level users more control over the drawing markups.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' on the project's Drawings tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * After the setting is enabled, users with 'Standard' level permission will be able to delete ANY published markups for drawings in the project (whether they created them or not).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click the **Configure settings** ![Icons Settings Gear](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/8d4e4403c0eed73423d93c414c08e3a6/35b17d2e5497c876221891c1d9e5a114/icons-settings-gear.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon.
  3. Mark the checkbox next to 'Allow standard level users to delete published markup'.  
  
![Allow Standard2015 07 10 14 36 06](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/7380c908915718c013b9d03f680dcd0f/9b27d8495d87968171d99244a8b652cd/allow-standard2015-07-10_14-36-06.png?fm=webp&h=227)
  4. Click **Update**.


##  Next Steps 
  * [Delete Published or Personal Drawing Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/delete-drawing-markups)


## See Also
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)

title: Allow  Users To Delete Published Markups
description: How to allow users with 'Standard' level permissions to delete any published markups in the Drawings tool.
